creator.name: Creator
creator.description: Platforms for the Creator Economy — from solo creators to multi-category setups

community.name: Community
community.description: Communities where every member can participate, post, and exchange ideas

company.name: Company
company.description: Corporate platforms for companies, universities, and alumni networks

contest.name: Contest
contest.description: Contest and voting platforms — supporting single events and multi-contest hubs

exhibition.name: Exhibition
exhibition.description: Exhibitions and trade shows — ticket sales and exhibitor management

creator-specific.name: Creator Specific
creator-specific.concept: Multiple creators, one category; visitors cannot post
creator-specific.creatorModel: Creators post content, receive votes and gifts, go live, and access monetization tools
creator-specific.visitorModel: Visitors view content, vote, send gifts, and subscribe — cannot post

creator-multi-category.name: Creator Multi Category
creator-multi-category.concept: Multiple creators, multiple categories; visitors cannot post
creator-multi-category.shortDescription: Multi-discipline creator hub, e.g. The Expert, The Consult
creator-multi-category.creatorModel: Creators organized by category, set their own service prices
creator-multi-category.visitorModel: Visitors follow creators in categories they care about

creator-single.name: Creator Single
creator-single.shortDescription: Dedicated platform for a celebrity or individual creator
creator-single.creatorModel: One creator controls all content and monetization
creator-single.visitorModel: Fans support through votes, gifts, and subscriptions

community-specific.name: Community Specific
community-specific.concept: Every member can post; no creator/visitor split
community-specific.shortDescription: Online community, e.g. TOM Thailand, Silom
community-specific.creatorModel: Every member can be a creator

the-company.name: The Company / Alumni / Gov
the-company.visitorModel: Members and interested users follow organization news

company-single.name: Company Single
company-single.visitorModel: Members and people interested in the organization

the-exhibition.name: The Exhibition
the-exhibition.shortDescription: Exhibition Hub for trade shows and expos
the-exhibition.visitorModel: Visitors buy tickets and browse events

vote.name: Vote
vote.workflow: Creator opens voting → visitor pays to vote → points accumulate in rankings

gift.name: Gift
gift.workflow: Visitor picks a sticker → pays from wallet → creator receives the gift

chat.name: Chat
chat.workflow: Creator sets price → visitor pays before sending → message reaches creator

voice-call.name: Voice Call
voice-call.workflow: Visitor buys time → starts a 1:1 voice call

video-call.name: Video Call
video-call.workflow: Visitor buys time → video call with gifts available during the session

live.name: Live
live.description: Live streaming — free, paid, or password-protected
live.workflow: Creator opens a live room → visitors join, comment, and send gifts

live-archive.name: Live Archive
live-archive.workflow: Creator saves a live stream → sets price → visitor pays to watch

unlock-photo.name: Unlock Photo
unlock-photo.workflow: Creator uploads blurred image → visitor pays to view the full image

unlock-video.name: Unlock Video
unlock-video.workflow: Creator uploads preview → visitor pays to watch the full video

subscription.name: Subscription
subscription.workflow: Creator builds premium content → visitor subscribes

fan-club.name: Fan Club
fan-club.workflow: Visitor joins fan club → earns badge and special perks

marketplace.name: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Buy and sell within the community

ranking.name: Ranking
ranking.description: Creator rankings based on votes and gifts

foxy.description: Mr.FOX's flagship Creator Economy platform — full support for votes, gifts, live streaming, and monetization

the-expert.description: Multi-disciplinary experts hub — consulting, coaching, and knowledge sharing

tom-thailand.description: Online community where every member can participate

miss-grand.description: Beauty pageant platform — vote and support contestants

exhibition-hub.description: Hub for exhibitions and trade shows

mrfox-ecosystem-launch.title: Mr.FOX Launches Creator Economy Platform Ecosystem
mrfox-ecosystem-launch.excerpt: 10 platform types covering Creator, Community, Company, Contest, and Exhibition
mrfox-ecosystem-launch.content: Mr.FOX announces a full-stack ecosystem for the Creator Economy, with monetization through votes, gifts, live streaming, subscriptions, and more.

foxy-app-update.title: FOXY App Update: New Live and Gift Features
foxy-app-update.excerpt: Adds animated gifts and improves the live streaming experience
foxy-app-update.content: FOXY launches a new animated gift collection and upgrades live rooms to support more concurrent viewers.

creator-platform-engine.title: Creator Platform Engine — Standard Template for Every App
creator-platform-engine.excerpt: A new engine helps launch creator platforms faster
creator-platform-engine.content: Mr.FOX develops the Creator Platform Engine as a standard template supporting wallet, votes, gifts, chat, live streaming, and video calls.
